rulings.Case Title: ROBERT ROSS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 30, 2017 in Department 503, Line 1. Specially appearing Hartford Fire Insurance Company's and Nationwide Insurance Co.'s motion to set aside default and default judgment against defendant Williams & Burrows, Inc. is off calendar as superseded by the November 6, 2017 amended notice setting the hearing for December 19, 2017. = (503/CML)
